response.justification: The candidate has genuine geospatial experience (GISCollective, Green Map GIS applications) and systems-level work in DLang handling millions of requests per second with async I/O and caching, which demonstrates the performance engineering mindset the role needs. However, modern C++ is the core requirement and his C++ exposure is dated (National Instruments 2014-2015, bachelor thesis), with no Rust experience and no routing or navigation pipeline work. Recent years have been TypeScript/Node full-stack product work, which is a significant drift from the role's profile.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial data platform experience as founder of GISCollective and Green Map contributor
Low-latency systems work in DLang (async I/O, fibers, caching) at high request volumes
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, open-source contributions
concerns: Modern C++ experience is minimal and roughly a decade old; no Rust experience
No direct routing, navigation guidance, or map-tiling pipeline experience
Recent roles are TypeScript/Node web product work, distant from systems-level pipeline engineering
